predicate.title: Leftovers registry: typed debt nodes + generated LEFTOVERS.md
predicate.problem: Known small debts (dev-mode stand-ins, copied fixtures, hand-maintained READMEs) are scattered across status notes and README caveats; the owner wants to occasionally run a single 'fix all leftovers' sweep, which needs one authoritative registry.
acceptance_criteria: leftover (and metric) node types exist in the spec schema
convention-leftovers defines what qualifies and the sweep lifecycle
All four currently-known small debts are registered as active leftover nodes
LEFTOVERS.md is generated and linked from the README
